arts.ttl: Arne Slot fires dig at Manchester City with Mohamed Salah 115 charges 'joke'
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has joked relegation for Manchester City could mean Sunday was Mohamed Salah's last game against the club

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot fires playful Man City joke after Mo Salah future admission
arts.sum: Manchester City are still contesting the 115 charges levelled at them by the Premier League and Arne Slot has used Mo Salah's comments to make a joke about Pep Guardiola's club

arts.ttl: Dressing room cracks, Rodri reality, Viana influence - the Man City transfer question with no answer
arts.sum: Manchester City are on their worst ever run under Pep Guardiola and look short of ideas of how to turn their fortunes around.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot jokes about Man City's 115 charges as Mohamed Salah contract question answered
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot jokes that Mohamed Salah might "know more" about Manchester City's 115 charges when asked about his "last" game claim against the champions.

arts.ttl: “I’d take him to Manchester City” – Rodri says he’d sign player ‘without a doubt’
arts.sum: Manchester City’s Rodri suffered a serious knee injury against Arsenal in September and is set to spend most of this season, at least, on the sidelines. The Spain international won the Ballon d’Or in October and returned to his country to collect another individual award from Spanish newspaper AS. arts.ttl: Forest owner Evangelos Marinakis announced as the winner of 2024 award previously won by Cesc Fabregas
Arne Slot makes Man City relegation joke after Salah comments: ‘Maybe Mo knows’
arts.sum: Salah said Sunday’s 2-0 win could have been his last game against Manchester City at Anfield, but Slot had an amusing explanation

arts.ttl: Revealed: FIFA confirm pots for 2025 Club World Cup draw - with Chelsea, Man City and Real Madrid all set to feature in the United States tournament
arts.sum: The 2025 Club World Cup will be contested by 32 clubs from the six continental confederations and will be the first edition in this format to take place in the United States.

arts.ttl: Adam Wharton: Man City, Arsenal suffer January blow as Crystal Palace 'set out transfer stance'
arts.sum: Manchester City and Arsenal are reportedly among the clubs who have suffered a blow in their pursuit of Crystal Palace midfielder Adam Wharton.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'step up' Viktor Gyokeres pursuit as Man City register interest
arts.sum: Man Utd have reportedly stepped up their interest in Sporting CP striker Viktor Gyokeres amid rival interest from Man City.
